content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Nifty +0.77%, pharma leading +2.77%, metals +2.02%, IT +1.60%. India VIX cooling -4.7% to 18.78 indicates risk-on. Book is 49% deployed with green unrealized P&L; priority is managing existing winners (trail SLs) rather than chasing extended breakouts.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Recovered today (+2.2% to 79.61 after yesterday's dip); thesis intact (Q4 PAT +35% YoY, GNPA 1.45%, PSU bank momentum). Current SL 76 is below recent swing low 76.95 — appropriate. Position still slightly negative so no trail yet."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.47,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Already up +6.6% with SL at 1035.47 (above entry 984 = breakeven+ locked). Current SL is already above breakeven so trailing mandate satisfied. No-op MODIFY — switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Near flat, FOMC Apr 29 binary event in 2 days. Hold as defensive ballast; SL 119 (~5% below entry) gives room through event."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1418.00,
      "new_target": 1480.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 1418 (above entry 1412.94) — breakeven locked. Stock at fresh 52w high after stellar Q4 (+27% PAT, double-digit volume). Current SL/target unchanged — no-op MODIFY, switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 690.00,
      "new_target": 725.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "Up +4% at 701.85, near 52w high. Q4 earnings Apr 29 (binary event) — tightening SL to 690 (above entry 681 = breakeven+1.3%) to lock gains ahead of event risk. USFDA overhang flagged; prefer protected position into earnings."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Slightly red -1.1%; Q4 results Apr 30 (binary event in 3 days). SL at 2260 (~4.7% below entry) appropriate for event. FMCG sector firm. Hold through event; do not tighten with binary catalyst pending."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 400.00,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "At 407, near 52w high. Trail SL up from 396 to 400 (still below entry 404.50 but tighter; full breakeven trail not yet warranted at +1% only). NGEL capacity additions, summer demand tailwinds intact."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Position still red, SL placed below recent swing support."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.47,
      "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven+; target 1100 still has ~5% room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hold through FOMC Apr 29."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1418.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven+; let winner run toward 1480 target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 690.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail to lock +1.3% above entry ahead of Apr 29 earnings event."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 in 3 days; current SL gives room for volatility."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 400.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten SL by Rs 4 as stock approaches 52w high; reduces risk while leaving room."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "SUNPHARMA +7% on Organon news — supplementary research is bearish (debt/leverage concerns, ~35x P/E, downtrend); will not chase post-gap. INDUSINDBK +3.9% but research flags severe red flags (FY26 PAT -65%, derivatives scandal, advances de-grew 8%) — AVOID despite Q4 beat. TORNTPOWER, HINDZINC, SAIL, ADANIENSOL all extended into 52w highs/breakouts — would have stacked into power+metals cluster. Already have NTPC for power exposure; prefer not to add correlated breakouts on a single rally session. ANANTRAJ ED-overhang is a no-go. Will revisit on a pullback or post-earnings clarity.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 49% deployed with 6 of 7 positions green or flat. Today's session is a broad rally — exactly the wrong context to chase fresh breakouts (deployment hysteresis + cluster discipline). Focus this tick is risk management: trailed SLs on GRANULES (Apr 29 earnings event protection) and NTPC. Three binary events pending: FOMC Apr 29 (GOLDBEES), GRANULES Q4 Apr 29, HUL Q4 Apr 30 — careful position sizing/SL discipline maintained ahead of these. No new entries justified at current extension levels."
}
